title: pigea calycina
intro: Pigea calycina is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, also known as the madder family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pigea calycina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Pigea calycina is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
